name: W. P. Carey Inc.
summary: PART I . General Development of Business W.P. Carey Inc. (W. P. Carey or the Company) is an internally-managed diversified REIT that, together with our consolidated subsidiaries and predecessors, is a leading owner of commercial real estate, net-leased to companies located primarily in the United States and Europe on a long-term basis.
